title: Simple Revive
description: Get Downed instead of Dying so your friends can Revive you!
body:
You get Downed instead of Dying and other players can Revive you by Sneaking

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4Ih0ljcKJcA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<details>
<summary>In Game Config Menu (for v2.0+)</summary>
  
`/function hexrev:admin/config` to access the Config Menu
![Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22207898ae9826f7a4f570652a9a458ffb71588f.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Config (for v1.9 and below)</summary>
  
`/function hexrev:admin/config` to access the Config Menu
`/scoreboard objectives setdisplay sidebar` to hide current settings

- `Downed Duration`: Maximum amount of time a player can stay downed before dying
- `Cooldown`: Amount of time that needs to pass after getting downed to get downed again
- `Revive Time`: Amount of time it takes to revive a player
- `Reviver Hunger Consumption`: Amount of hunger it takes to revive a player
- `Downed Hunger Consumption`: Amount of hunger it takes to get revived
![Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a259fd6aaeba19aba69aaa8040f7acf9b3fcd6a2.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Troubleshooting</summary>

If you are having issues with the datapack, try doing these(not all of them at the same time)  
- Try running `/reload`
- Try running `/function hexrev:load`
- Try running `/function hexrev:setup` (this resets the config, only for v1.9 and below)
- Make sure you have the file on the proper directory: `[world name]/datapacks/[.zip goes here]` for the datapack and `mods/[.jar goes here]` for the mod version (the jar file having "+Datapack" at the end does not mean that it's a datapack)
- The Essentials plugin might be messing with the datapack as it usually does
- Try restarting the server

</details>

<details>
<summary>Compatibility</summary>

- Compatible with [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/datapacks/) Graves Datapack
- For v1.9 and below: Might have issues with other datapacks using `/team`, Disable `Mobs Ignore Downed Players` in the Config if you are running into issues with this

</details>

<details>
<summary>For Devs and Admins</summary>
  
- If you want to make a player unable to get downed, give them the tag `hexrev.custom_disable`

</details>

<details>
<summary>Known Bugs</summary>
  
- Getting downed will still consume your Respawn Anchor charge
- Players can momentarily see tp to players' and see their locations as they are in spectator mode when downed

</details>

Contact me on Discord for any issues! @hexasan
